en_title: 1666: Amsterdam Creator on the Game's Timelines... and Playing as a Cat! | IGN Live 2026
cn_title: 《1666：阿姆斯特丹》可扮演猫咪，制作人揭秘时间线
subtitle: 喵星人穿越时空
opus_summary: 在IGN Live 2026上，《1666：阿姆斯特丹》制作人Patrice Désilets透露，玩家可扮演一只猫，它实际是来自1999年的人。游戏开发15年，现已推出免费试玩序章，登陆PC、Steam和Epic Games商店。

paragraphs.en: On the heels of the release of a playable 30-minute demo , 1666: Amsterdam creator Patrice Désilets took to the stage at IGN Live today to discuss the game he fought so hard to complete. 1666: Amsterdam's infamously long development process took over 15 years, which included both the game and Destilets spending time at multiple companies, before he was able to secure the rights back to finally complete his labor of love.
paragraphs.cn: 在推出可玩30分钟试玩版后，《1666：阿姆斯特丹》制作人Patrice Désilets今日登上IGN Live舞台，畅谈他奋力完成的这款游戏。《1666：阿姆斯特丹》的开发过程长达15年之久，期间游戏和Désilets本人辗转多家公司，最终他才得以收回版权，完成了这部心血之作。

paragraphs.en: The director of Prince of Persia: The Sands of Time, Assassin's Creed 1 and 2, and Ancestors: The Humankind Odyssey, and co-founder and creative director of Panache Digital Games, Désilets explained his persistence, telling the IGN Live audience, "When you have an idea and you feel there's something to it, you have to stick with it. That's how I am."
paragraphs.cn: 作为《波斯王子：时之砂》、《刺客信条》1代和2代以及《先祖：人类奥德赛》的导演，同时也是Panache Digital Games的联合创始人兼创意总监，Désilets解释了自己的坚持，他对IGN Live的观众说：「当你有一个想法，并且觉得它有价值时，你就必须坚持下去。我就是这样的人。」

paragraphs.en: Originally, his idea was to have a game where you'd play as the devil, but then series like Lucifer made him feel there'd been a lot of onscreen depictions of Satan lately. That made him switch to something that could represent the devil - in this case, witches.
paragraphs.cn: 最初，他的想法是制作一款扮演魔鬼的游戏，但随后像《路西法》这样的剧集让他觉得最近银幕上对撒旦的描绘已经太多了。这让他转而选择能够代表魔鬼的事物——在本作中，就是女巫。

paragraphs.en: Though the perspective of the prologue bounces around through multiple characters like Clio in the modern day, her father Aaron in 1999, and the witch Noa in 1666, Désilets broke things down as far as how much time you spend playing in each time period.
paragraphs.cn: 尽管序章的视角在现代的Clio、1999年的父亲Aaron以及1666年的女巫Noa等多个角色间切换，但Désilets详细说明了玩家在每个时间段花费的游戏时长。

paragraphs.en: As he put it, "5% of the time you're in present day in a library, with Clio tying to decipher a book. Let's say 15% of the time you're in 1999, and the rest you're in 1666 as Noa." He described the 1666 and 1999 portions as "kind of like a mirror of each other,"
paragraphs.cn: 他说道：「5%的时间你在现代的图书馆里，Clio试图破译一本书。大概15%的时间你在1999年，其余时间你在1666年扮演Noa。」他将1666年和1999年的部分描述为「彼此像镜子一样」，

paragraphs.en: But there was one other crucial piece of information about 1666: Amsterdam, as Désilets revealed, "The main thing, and it's very important, is... you play as a cat!"
paragraphs.cn: 但关于《1666：阿姆斯特丹》还有另一个关键信息，Désilets透露道：「最主要的一点，而且非常重要，就是……你可以扮演一只猫！」

paragraphs.en: We then saw footage of the aforementioned feline on screen, with him running and leaping along through the dark and spooky streets, with Désilets noting you play as "a cat who is actually a guy from 1999."
paragraphs.cn: 随后我们看到了上述猫咪的片段，它在黑暗阴森的街道上奔跑跳跃，Désilets指出你扮演的是「一只猫，它实际上是来自1999年的一个人。」

paragraphs.en: 1666: Amsterdam will be available on PC. The prologue is available to play for free now on Steam and Epic Games Store.
paragraphs.cn: 《1666：阿姆斯特丹》将登陆PC平台。序章现已在Steam和Epic Games商店免费提供游玩。

paragraphs.en: Be sure to keep up with everything going on at IGN Live 2026 . You can check the full schedule to see what else is coming up across games, movies, TV, streaming, and more.
paragraphs.cn: 请务必关注IGN Live 2026的所有动态。你可以查看完整日程，了解游戏、电影、电视、流媒体等更多精彩内容。
